mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.inverter_id AS inverterId, a.status, a.alert_type AS alertType, a.severity, a.message, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.resolved_at AS resolvedAt, /* 인버터가 속한 발전소의 이름을 위치 정보로 가져옴 */ p.name AS location FROM alert_log a LEFT JOIN inverter i ON a.inverter_id = i.id LEFT JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
